options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -array
options.description: delete all the array constraint

options.name: -avoid_abut_macro_edge_with_pins
options.description: specify that not abut macro edges with pins even macro distance is within forbidden spacing setting

options.name: -cell_obs
options.description: delete all the cell obs constraint

options.name: -cpg
options.description: delete all the cpg constraint

options.name: -forbidden_space_to_core
options.description: reset the forbidden space to core

options.name: -forbidden_space_to_macro
options.description: reset the forbidden space to macro

options.name: -honor_strict_spacing_constraint
options.description: specify that not honor forbidden spacing and minimum spacing strictly

options.name: -horizontal_stacking
options.description: reset the max horizontal stack depth and the minimum horizontal spacing

options.name: -instance_orientation
options.description: delete all the instance orientations

options.name: -macro_corner_keepout
options.description: reset macro corner keepout constraint

options.name: -max_io_pin_group_keep_out
options.description: delete the macro-only blockages which are automatically added to IO pins and reset the max height or width of macro-only blockages to 0

options.name: -min_space_to_core
options.description: reset the minimum space to core

options.name: -min_space_to_macro
options.description: reset the minimum space to macro

options.name: -parallel_run_length
options.description: reset the parallel run length to enable space checking

options.name: -parallel_run_length_for_stacking
options.description: reset the stacking parallel run length

options.name: -pg_resource_model
options.description: delete the pg resource model

options.name: -power_domain_as_core
options.description: reset the power domain as core

options.name: -same_length_site
options.description: reset the minimum difference site number

options.name: -track_adjustment
options.description: delete all the track adjustment

options.name: -vertical_stacking
options.description: reset the max vertical stack depth and the minimum vertical spacing
